nasb.text: But he who practices the truth comes to the Light, so that his deeds may be manifested as having been wrought in God.”

esv.text: But whoever does what is true comes to the light, so that it may be clearly seen that his works have been carried out in God.”

cnv.text: 凡行真理的，就來接近光，好顯明他所作的都是靠著　神而作的。”

ccb.text: 但遵行真理的人喜欢接近光，好显明他所做的是靠上帝做的。”

csbs.text: 但行真理的人，却来到光那里，为了显明自己所做的是在神里面被做成的。”
